kw.name: Open Browser To Application
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Screenshot Directory
kw.doc: Sets the directory for captured screenshots.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.
Mở browser và truy cập website

test.name: TC_BOOKING_REG_01

kw.name: Navigate To Pitches Page
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.msg: Element 'xpath=(//a[contains(text(),'Xem chi tiết')])[1]' not visible after 20 seconds.
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
kw.status: Element 'xpath=(//a[contains(text(),'Xem chi tiết')])[1]' not visible after 20 seconds.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.status: Element 'xpath=(//a[contains(text(),'Xem chi tiết')])[1]' not visible after 20 seconds.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

test.status: Element 'xpath=(//a[contains(text(),'Xem chi tiết')])[1]' not visible after 20 seconds.

test.name: TC_BOOKING_REG_02

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Element with locator 'xpath=//a[contains(.,'Tiến hành đặt sân')]' not found.
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.
kw.status: Element with locator 'xpath=//a[contains(.,'Tiến hành đặt sân')]' not found.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

test.status: Element with locator 'xpath=//a[contains(.,'Tiến hành đặt sân')]' not found.

test.name: TC_BOOKING_REG_03

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Page should have contained text 'Lịch đặt sân' but did not.
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.
kw.status: Page should have contained text 'Lịch đặt sân' but did not.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

test.status: Page should have contained text 'Lịch đặt sân' but did not.

test.name: TC_BOOKING_REG_04

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain Element
kw.msg: Page should have contained element 'xpath=//a[contains(.,'Tiến hành đặt sân')]' but did not.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.
kw.status: Page should have contained element 'xpath=//a[contains(.,'Tiến hành đặt sân')]' but did not.

test.status: Page should have contained element 'xpath=//a[contains(.,'Tiến hành đặt sân')]' but did not.

kw.name: Close Browser Application
Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Đóng browser

suite.name: Booking Modal Tests

kw.name: Open Browser To Application
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Screenshot Directory
kw.doc: Sets the directory for captured screenshots.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.
Mở browser và truy cập website

test.name: TC_SMOKE_01: Có Thể Truy Cập Trang Danh Sách Sân

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

test.name: TC_SMOKE_03: Có Thể Điều Hướng Đến Trang Booking

kw.name: Navigate To Booking Page

kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click Link
kw.doc: Clicks a link identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.
Điều hướng tới trang booking theo luồng thực tế

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'Xác nhận đặt sân'.
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

test.doc: Kiểm tra luồng chọn sân và chuyển sang trang booking

test.doc: Kiểm tra người dùng có thể hủy booking tại popup xác nhận

kw.name: Close Browser Application
Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Đóng browser

suite.doc: Smoke Tests - Kiểm tra chức năng đặt sân bóng

suite.name: Booking Negative Tests

kw.name: Open Browser To Application
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Screenshot Directory
kw.doc: Sets the directory for captured screenshots.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.
Mở browser và truy cập website

kw.doc: Returns the value attribute of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is true.

kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Get WebElement
kw.doc: Returns the first WebElement matching the given ``locator``.

kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

Chuyển từ chọn sân sang trang xác nhận đặt sân
Chọn khung giờ đầu tiên và chuyển sang trang xác nhận đặt sân

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Hoàng Thị E' into text field 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='Nguyễn Văn A']'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Textfield Value Should Be
kw.msg: Content of text field 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='Nguyễn Văn A']' is 'Hoàng Thị E'.
kw.doc: Verifies text field ``locator`` has exactly text ``expected``.

kw.name: Textfield Value Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies text field ``locator`` has exactly text ``expected``.

kw.name: Textfield Value Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies text field ``locator`` has exactly text ``expected``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Close Browser Application
Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Đóng browser

suite.doc: Regression Tests - Kiểm tra các lỗi tái diễn

kw.name: Open Browser To Application
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Screenshot Directory
kw.doc: Sets the directory for captured screenshots.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.
Mở browser và truy cập website

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Close Browser Application
Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Đóng browser
